zh.lifeSummary: Henry Burt於大約1567年出生在英國。他於大約1592年與Mrs. Henry Burt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於從1617年7月10日到1617年9月10日在英國戴文哈波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Burt于大约1567年出生在英国。他于大约1592年与Mrs. Henry Burt结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于从1617年7月10日到1617年9月10日在英国戴文哈波頓。

nameMeanings.name: Burt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Birt
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places in the Rhineland named Birth or Birten.
In some cases also Croatian: occupational name from birt ‘inn-keeper’, a regional or colloquial word of German origin (see Wirt ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Henry Burt was born about 1567, in England. He married Mrs. Henry Burt about 1592. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died from 10 July 1617 to 10 September 1617, in Harberton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Burt est né environ 1567, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs. Henry Burt environ 1592. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé du 10 juillet 1617 au 10 septembre 1617, à Harberton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Henry Burt wurde um 1567 in England geboren. Er hat um 1592 Mrs. Henry Burt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb von 10. Juli 1617 bis 10. September 1617 in Harberton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Burt è nato il circa 1567 nel England. Lui sposato Mrs. Henry Burt circa 1592. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì da 10 luglio 1617 a 10 settembre 1617, nel Harberton, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Burtは約1567年にイギリスで生まれた。約1592年にMrs. Henry Burtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はから1617年7月10日まで1617年9月10日にイギリスデボンハーバートンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Burt(은)는 대략 1567년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1592년 Mrs. Henry Burt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 7월 10일부터 1617년 9월 10일까지 영국 데폰 하르버턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Burt nasceu aproximadamente 1567, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Henry Burt aproximadamente 1592. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu de 10 de julho de 1617 a 10 de setembro de 1617, em Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Burt родился около 1567 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Henry Burt около 1592 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер с 10 июля 1617 по 10 сентября 1617 в местности харбиртон, девон, Англия.
